description: Manufactures precision machinery and instruments including medical endoscopes, surgical devices, biological/industrial microscopes, and NDT equipment. Operates through Endoscopic Solutions, Therapeutic Solutions, and Scientific Solutions segments.

_externalRelationships.notes: Primarily a medical devices company (endoscopes, surgical devices). Scientific segment includes industrial microscopes and NDT equipment. Limited direct semiconductor supply chain involvement.

_metadata.notes: Founded 1919, HQ: Hachioji. 29,300 employees. EBITDA: 223.65B JPY, margin 25.32%. FY2026 target: 19% adjusted operating profit, 1% annual margin improvement. Medical focus, less semiconductor exposure.
